_status_note: verified_in_runner = 'BOOKING STATUS: CONFIRMED' signal confirmed in source. Whether Claude actually uses this signal to give a confident 'yes' answer requires live API testing.
title: Booking close: 'is it done?' should get clear confirmation, not restart flow
failing_behavior: After the booking packet was shown, when customer asked 'is it done?' or 'was it confirmed?', the AI either (a) re-entered booking collection flow asking for service/date/time again, or (b) gave an ambiguous answer. _buildBookingStateContext showed Date/Time as 'not yet specified' after booking, making Claude think the booking was incomplete.
root_cause: After _submitDirectBooking, biz._bookingState has services/staff/name/phone but date=null, time=null (cleared before _submitDirectBooking ran). _buildBookingStateContext showed these as 'not yet specified' — Claude interpreted this as an in-progress incomplete booking. Two fixes: (1) BOOKING STATUS: CONFIRMED in state context. (2) Confirmation text says 'no further action needed'.
precondition: biz._lastBookingId='DLC-TEST99'. biz._bookingState={services:['Gel Manicure'], staff:'Tracy', name:'Sarah', phone:'4085559876', date:null, time:null, pendingAction:null}.
notes: biz._lastBookingId is checked in _buildBookingStateContext: if lastBookingId is set AND name/phone present AND date/time null, append BOOKING STATUS: CONFIRMED. This tells Claude the booking is done, not incomplete.
